title: Solar glowsign
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Solar glowsigns''' could be found on [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]]. They blinked after a few days of cloudy weather.

==Behind the scenes==
These are comparable to [[Neon/Legends|neon]] signs.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'' {{Mo}}

[[Category:Illumination devices]]
